description_long: This is a pair of vintage brown leather lace-up boots, each fitted with a wooden shoe tree inserted inside. The boots feature a high ankle design with multiple eyelets for lacing, and the leather shows visible creasing and patina, indicating age and use. The toe caps are subtly decorated with brogue-style perforations, and the soles are made of a darker, worn material. The shoe trees have rounded wooden knobs and metal rods, helping to maintain the boots' shape. The boots' overall appearance suggests they are sturdy and were once used for formal or semi-formal occasions. The rich brown color and classic design make them stand out as a timeless personal item.
description: A pair of vintage brown leather lace-up boots with wooden shoe trees, showing visible wear and classic brogue detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the laced-up design, toe cap perforations, and the wooden shoe trees inserted inside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the high ankle cut, creased leather, and the full length of the shoe trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel, back seam, and the rounded tops of the shoe trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the lacing, side creases, and the overall silhouette of the boots.
